messages.content:
CVE-2021-22166 is a high-severity vulnerability affecting GitLab versions 13.7.0 to 13.7.1 in both Community and Enterprise editions. This vulnerability arises from improper resource management, categorized under CWE-400. An attacker can exploit this flaw by sending an HTTP request with a malformed method, resulting in a denial-of-service (DoS) condition within the Prometheus monitoring system.

The potential impact of this vulnerability is significant, as it can lead to resource exhaustion, causing service downtime and affecting system availability. The related MITRE ATT&CK technique is T1499, which focuses on resource exhaustion attacks.

To mitigate this vulnerability, users are advised to apply the mitigation techniques represented by M1037. It is crucial to update GitLab to versions outside the affected range to ensure protection against this DoS threat.
